message:
fix: replace fragile is_some_and+unwrap with idiomatic if-let in log_viewer

The highlight range check used is_some_and() followed by .unwrap() on the
same Option. While safe (the unwrap is guarded by the preceding check), this
pattern is fragile if the condition ever diverges. Replace with if-let +
.filter() which destructures the value safely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
